description_long: This is a modern bungalow residence surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The structure features a combination of flat and low-pitched gable roofs, with a large driveway leading to an attached garage. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool, a wooden deck, and outdoor seating, while the front yard is landscaped with mature trees and a paved walkway. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored materials, and the windows are large and arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light. The property is set within a rectangular lot, with clear separations between the front, side, and backyard spaces. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living and privacy within a suburban neighborhood context.
description: A modern bungalow with a mix of flat and gable roofs, landscaped yards, a pool, and an attached garage, enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front and left side of the bungalow with the pool, deck, and main entrance visible, along with lush landscaping.
description_view_1: Rear and right side showing the garage, driveway, and more of the backyard landscaping.
description_view_2: Driveway and garage entrance, with the front yard and mature trees most prominent.
description_view_3: Back and right side, highlighting the pool, deck, and rear yard with privacy fencing.
attribute_roof_type: combination of flat and low-pitched gable
